# totalActivityDuration

**Instance Property**

Access the total activity time during the activity segment.

## Declaration

```swift
var totalActivityDuration: TimeInterval
```

## Discussion

This value represents the total amount of time the device’s screen remained on during [doc://com.apple.DeviceActivity/documentation/DeviceActivity/DeviceActivityData/ActivitySegment/dateInterval].

## Measuring activity

- **longestActivity**: Access the date interval of the longest activity session during the activity segment.
